app.title: Reconcile
app.subtitle: FDS Document Reconciliation
app.metaDescription: Compare, query, and summarize Functional Design Spec versions with full citation traceability.

banner.backendUnreachable: Can't reach the backend at http://localhost:8000. Run docker compose up --build from the project root.
banner.apiKeyMissing: Backend is running but GEMINI_API_KEY is missing. Get a free key at Google AI Studio, add it to backend/.env, and restart Docker.

ingest.title: Load your documents
ingest.description: Upload Document A (older version, e.g. PDF) and Document B (newer version, e.g. DOCX). Each file is parsed, chunked, embedded, and indexed for the agents. You must ingest both before Compare, Ask, or Executive Summary will work.
ingest.ingestSecondDoc: Ingest the second document to unlock Compare, Ask, and Executive Summary.
ingest.bothReady: Both documents are ready for the agents.
ingest.fileTypes: PDF or DOCX from your computer
ingest.ingestingLarge: Parsing tables and embedding — large PDFs can take 2–5 minutes…
ingest.fileSizeReplace: {{size}} KB · click or drop to replace

compare.title: Comparison
compare.docsRequired: Load both Document A and Document B to run a comparison.
compare.loading: Reading both documents and reconciling section by section — this can take a moment.
compare.query: Compare the two documents in full: what matches, what changed, and what is missing.
compare.emptyDiff: No meaningfully changed sections were found.
compare.emptyMissing: Nothing is one-sided — every retrieved topic appears in both documents.
compare.emptyMatch: No semantically identical sections were found.
compare.emptyPrompt: Run a full reconciliation when you're ready — matches, changes, and missing sections are computed on demand.

chat.title: Ask
chat.description: Grounded Q&A — every answer is traced back to retrieved content, or the system tells you it doesn't know.
chat.docsRequired: Load at least one document to start asking questions.
chat.emptyState: Ask a question about {{scope}}, or ask to compare them / summarize changes — those render as structured cards right here in the conversation. Answers are grounded strictly in retrieved content, with citations.
chat.placeholderNoDoc: Load a document for this scope first…
chat.lowConfidence: Low confidence — verify against the source

freeChat.title: Free Chat
freeChat.description: One conversational surface for single-doc questions, cross-document analysis, structured comparison, and executive summaries — coordinated by the backend agent graph.
freeChat.emptyNoDocs: Upload Document A and Document B first. Free chat sends all loaded documents to POST /api/v1/query; the Router Agent classifies your intent and runs the matching workflow.
freeChat.panelSubtitle: Ask anything — the Router Agent picks the workflow (chat, compare, or summary).
freeChat.intro: Natural-language Q&A over your ingested FDS documents. The backend LangGraph pipeline routes each question to the right agents — retrieval, comparison, summary, validation, and citations — with conversation memory across turns.
freeChat.placeholderNoDoc: Load documents on the Documents page first…

starters.phaseA: What is Phase A in the newer document?
starters.naUplift: What changed in the NA uplift rules between versions?
starters.compare: Compare both documents — what matches, changed, or is missing?
starters.top10: Give me the top 10 most important changes as an executive summary.
starters.threePhase: Explain the three-phase transformation strategy in plain language.

summary.title: Executive Summary
summary.subtitle: Ranked by semantic importance, not document order.
summary.docsRequired: Load both Document A and Document B to generate an executive summary.
summary.loading: Ranking changes by business, architecture, and workflow impact…
summary.query: Give me the executive summary of the top most important changes between versions.
summary.topChanges: Top {{count}} Changes — Ranked by Business Importance
summary.emptyPrompt: Generate the executive summary when you're ready — top changes ranked by business importance.
